//: Project-scoped MCP servers for uniblox. Reachability is DEFERRED: still needs live services + a GitHub PAT (in .claude/settings.local.json, gitignored, NEVER here). node/npx come from the flake devShell (DECISIONS.md ADR-0010), so each server runs via `direnv exec <repo> npx ...` in a login shell (direnv is on PATH there). Requires a one-time `direnv allow`.

postgres.//: READ-ONLY Postgres. Point the DSN at a read-only role once the platform DB exists (Phase 7).

docs.//: Context7-style docs server — counters hallucinated Bevy/matchbox/str0m/Rhai APIs. Verify APIs here, never from memory.

playwright.//: Browser E2E for the two WASM builds + capability detection. Needs Playwright browsers installed.
